task_completion.description: Navigate to the Compliance Analysis section in Eramba
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Eramba web interface is visible, showing the 'Compliance Analysis' or 'Compliance Packages' module.

task_completion.description: Locate the 'A.12.3.1 - Information Backup' compliance record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The specific compliance item 'A.12.3.1 - Information Backup' (or 'Information Backup' under 'A.12.3.1') is visible in the list or detailed view.

task_completion.description: Open the attachment or evidence upload dialog for the target item
task_completion.visual_evidence: A modal, panel, or page section for adding attachments/evidence is open, clearly associated with the 'A.12.3.1' compliance item.

task_completion.description: Select the correct backup log file for upload
task_completion.visual_evidence: A system file picker dialog shows the selection of 'Backup_Log_Sept2025.pdf' from the '/home/ga/Documents/Evidence/' directory, or the file name is populated in the upload input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the file is successfully attached to the record
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file 'Backup_Log_Sept2025.pdf' is listed as an attachment under the 'A.12.3.1 - Information Backup' record, possibly accompanied by a success message.

integrity.description: The agent used a web browser to interact with Eramba
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a standard web browser (e.g., Firefox, Chrome) navigating the Eramba UI, rather than terminal commands like curl.

integrity.description: The agent uploaded the actual file via the GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The file upload was performed using the browser's file upload mechanism (file picker or drag-and-drop), not by typing the file path into a text field that doesn't upload the file.

integrity.description: The attachment was added to the correct compliance item
integrity.visual_evidence: The attachment is strictly associated with 'A.12.3.1 - Information Backup' and not mistakenly uploaded to a different compliance record.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target compliance item is 'A.12.3.1 - Information Backup' located within the 'ISO 27001 (Internal)' compliance package. The evidence file to be uploaded is 'Backup_Log_Sept2025.pdf', located at '/home/ga/Documents/Evidence/'.
